tiles.name: Niches
tiles.description: Private Equity institution types and market niches

institutions.name: Large-Cap LBO Funds
institutions.description: Global mega funds executing multi-billion leveraged buyouts of large corporations.

functions.name: Mega Buyout Execution
functions.description: Structuring and executing multi-billion leveraged acquisitions.

functions.name: Complex Debt Structuring
functions.description: Designing layered financing structures including senior, mezzanine, and PIK instruments.

functions.name: Portfolio Value Creation
functions.description: Driving operational improvements and strategic repositioning.

functions.name: Global Exit Strategy
functions.description: Planning IPOs or secondary buyouts to maximize investor returns.

institutions.name: Mid-Market Private Equity
institutions.description: Funds investing in SMEs with enterprise values typically between €50M and €500M.

functions.name: SME Acquisition Strategy
functions.description: Identifying and acquiring mid-sized companies with growth potential.

functions.name: Buy-and-Build Consolidation
functions.description: Expanding companies via strategic add-on acquisitions.

functions.name: Operational Efficiency Programs
functions.description: Improving margins through operational restructuring.

functions.name: Regional Market Expansion
functions.description: Supporting portfolio companies in expanding to new markets.

institutions.name: Secondaries Funds
institutions.description: Funds purchasing existing stakes in private equity funds from LPs seeking liquidity.

functions.name: LP Stake Acquisition
functions.description: Purchasing limited partner interests in existing PE funds.

functions.name: Portfolio Valuation Analysis
functions.description: Assessing fair value of fund holdings.

functions.name: Liquidity Provision
functions.description: Providing early liquidity to LPs locked in long-term PE funds.

functions.name: Secondary Portfolio Management
functions.description: Managing diversified exposure across multiple funds.

institutions.name: Co-Investment Vehicles
institutions.description: Investment structures where LPs invest directly alongside the GP in specific deals.

functions.name: Direct Deal Participation
functions.description: Allowing LPs to invest directly in specific portfolio acquisitions.

functions.name: Fee Reduction Structuring
functions.description: Reducing management and carried interest costs for LP investors.

functions.name: Deal Syndication
functions.description: Sharing deal exposure between multiple institutional investors.

functions.name: LP Strategic Partnerships
functions.description: Strengthening relationships between GPs and institutional LPs.

institutions.name: Venture Debt Funds
institutions.description: Specialized lenders providing non-dilutive capital to venture-backed startups.

functions.name: Structured Startup Lending
functions.description: Providing loans tailored to startup growth stages.

functions.name: Warrant-Linked Financing
functions.description: Combining debt instruments with equity warrants.

functions.name: Startup Credit Risk Analysis
functions.description: Evaluating financial sustainability of startups.

functions.name: Growth Capital Structuring
functions.description: Designing financing aligned with venture-backed growth.

tiles.name: Jobs
tiles.description: Career roles and positions in Private Equity

tiles.name: Tasks
tiles.description: Key activities and responsibilities in Private Equity
